testcase.name: tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count_sort_

error.message: Error in `tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count(ADAE_subset, denominator = cards::ADSL, by = TRTA, variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD), sort = "descending")`: The following columns are not present: "stat_name", "stat_label", "stat", "fmt_fun", "warning", and "error". ('test-tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count.R:56:3')

testcase.error: Error in `tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count(ADAE_subset, denominator = cards::ADSL, by = TRTA, variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD), sort = "descending")`: The following columns are not present: "stat_name", "stat_label", "stat", "fmt_fun", "warning", and "error". Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─testthat::expect_silent(...) at test-tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count.R:56:3 2. │ └─testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, evaluate_promise) 3. │ ├─testthat (local) .capture(...) 4. │ │ ├─withr::with_output_sink(...) 5. │ │ │ └─base::force(code) 6. │ │ ├─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 7. │ │ └─base::withVisible(code) 8. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 9. ├─gtsummary::add_overall(...) 10. │ └─gtsummary:::check_class(x, "gtsummary") 11. └─crane::tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count(...) 12. ├─gtsummary::sort_hierarchical(tbl_rates, sort = sort) 13. └─gtsummary:::sort_hierarchical.tbl_hierarchical(tbl_rates, sort = sort) 14. └─gtsummary:::.reshape_ard_compare(...) 15. └─cards::as_card(dplyr::mutate(dplyr::group_keys(x_ard), pre_idx = dplyr::row_number())) 16. └─cards::check_ard_structure(...) 17. └─cards:::.message_or_error(...) 18. └─cli::cli_abort(msg, call = call, .envir = envir) 19. └─rlang::abort(...)

testcase.name: tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade_works

error.message: Error in `tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade(ADAE_subset, variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD, AETOXGR), denominator = ADSL, by = TRTA, label = label)`: The following columns are not present: "stat_name", "stat_label", "stat", "fmt_fun", "warning", and "error". ('test-tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade.R:26:3')

testcase.name: tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade_filter_works

error.message: Error in `tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade(ADAE_subset, variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD, AETOXGR), denominator = ADSL, by = TRTA, label = label, filter = sum(n)/sum(N) > 0.07, grade_groups = grade_groups)`: The following columns are not present: "stat_name", "stat_label", "stat", "fmt_fun", "warning", and "error".
